FAQCan I reuse this template as-is?Yes. The demo version can stay educational, while the lite clone can remove the long explanations.What changes in the slim version?Add data-faq=m
items.selector: div.canvas-wrapper > div.--body > div.--site-wrapper > div.--site-main > div.--inner > div[data-id="container03"]

items.textSample: FAQ
Can I reuse this template as-is?
Yes. The demo version can stay educational, while the lite clone can remove the long explanations.
What changes in the slim version?
Add data-faq=main to the container and keep the questions in order. The plugin handles the interaction.
Add data-faq=main to the container and keep the questions in order. The plugin handles the interaction.
Can I sell the mini-template network separately?
Keep the plugin runtime, trim the narrative copy, and leave the conversion blocks in place.
DemoPricingFAQThis page is the proof-of-work and the product page.It shows the stack, the selling path, and the reusable layout.That makes the demo useful even before a buyer click
items.selector: div.canvas-wrapper > div.--body > div.--site-wrapper > div.--site-main > div.--inner > div[data-id="container01"]

items.textSample: DemoPricingFAQ
This page is the proof-of-work and the product page.
It shows the stack, the selling path, and the reusable layout.
That makes the demo useful even before a buyer clicks through.
What ships in the full kit
Use this area for proof, policy, or a longer explanation of the system.
A good template does three jobs: it teaches, it sells, and it can be reused without rebuilding the structure.
The layout stays readable even when the page carries more selling logic.
A second paragraph may contain bold text, italic text, and even bold italic text to test emphasis styles. Inline elements such as Underline or highlighted phrases can also appear i
